catalysts_general: Trading at 38% discount to analyst median target of $73

PEG 0.86 indicates growth-at-reasonable-price profile

value_picks.analyst_take: CTSH offers a clean value setup: 7.6% FCF yield, net cash, 2.5% dividend, and a 38% discount to analyst targets in a beaten-down IT services name. The 24% rise in short interest argues the market is pricing in AI disruption; willingness to underwrite a neutral AI outcome is the central thesis question.

Unlike commodity IT peers, ACN's AI consulting franchise is a genuine tailwind — making the drawdown look more like sentiment than fundamental impairment.

WATCHLIST until forward guidance demonstrates pricing resilience; rerate to BUY only on a dip into the high-$80s.
